title: Two Girls Wanted
writer: Malcolm Stuart Boylan, Randall Faye, Seton I. Miller
actors: Janet Gaynor, Glenn Tryon, Ben Bard
plot: Marianna Miller, dressing as a boy to seek employment in the city, becomes involved with a gang of ruffians; and when she hits Dexter Wright, a young businessman, with a tomato, he detects her disguise and helps her obtain a secre...
